feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: WBS - Project with Revenue - Margin Analysis not updated
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have client scenario, wherein as part of purchase Project/WBS need to be used and it need to be settled to Profitability segment.

Considering in Public Cloud only project with project profile "Project with Revenue" can be settled to profitability segment, we planned to use it for above scenario.

But when we are posting Good receipt to WBS with project profile "Project with revenue", values are not updated in margin analysis.

Request you to help with it.

Regards

Sandeep

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Increase decimals in currency
entry.content:
Good afternoon
Dear Experts

How can I increase the decimals in my USD currency, in the SAP S4 HANA CLOUD PUBLIC environment.

What SSCUI ID should I use or is it not feasible to do so?

Thank you for your kind collaboration.
Best regards.

entry.title: Assistance Needed in Configuring Trust Between Cloud Identity Services and SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently configuring trust between Cloud Identity Services and SAP BTP Account. I am following the instructions in this article Click Here  but have encountered an issue at Step 6.

According to the documentation, there should be an option labeled "YOUR CORPORATE IDP" in the Default Identity Provider field at Step 5. However, I am not seeing this option. Could someone please assist?

Well, my screen doesn't have this option -

entry.title: Authorization for Run Settlement
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

I met an authorization issue about run settlement. Why finance receive a error said she had no authorization for company code asset class. Where can I find the relevant documents? and which other roles does she need?

entry.title: SOURCING & PROCUREMENT - PURCHASE RATE CONTRACT IN SAP CLOUD
entry.content:
Dear Team

Basically our clients requirement is RATE CONTRACT but in SAP we have only quantity contract & value contract. We want when We  create po with reference to  value contract , price & condition should copy in po from value contract and it should not be editable in PO. user will only enter quantity in po.  Also we are not able to add condition in value contract like basic price , discount etc. Please let us know whether schema can assign to Contract or we have to add condition through condition record.   

 

Rajesh

entry.title: BNJ and BLD test scripts are not supported in test automation tool
entry.content:
Hi,

In test automation tool when I want to select master data topics to create a test process, they are not displayed to me.

I got the master data scopes from below links.

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/BP_CLD_ENTPR/BP_CLD_ENTPR_S4CLD2202_27_Master_Data_EN_XX.htm

https://help.sap.com/docs/s4hana-best-practices/s4cld2408-master-data/start

Any idea?

BR,

Amin

entry.title: Display a List and Allow Form Printing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am new to developing applications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I am seeking guidance on how to create an app in the public version. My goal is to develop an application that:

  • Displays a list of products based on specific logic.
  • Includes a button that allows printing a form for those products.

Could you help me with advice or resources on how to get started with this? Any guide, tutorial, or example would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you very much in advance for your support!

entry.title: Supplier invoice Posting Date and Invoice Date
entry.content:
Hi,

We would like to know why there is a difference between the ‘Invoice Date’ and the ‘Posting Date’ of a Supplier Invoice.

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Situation Handling Object: Creation Not Allowed via ADT
entry.content:
Hi All,

On S/4HANA Public Cloud: Has anyone successfully created a Custom Situation Object via ADT and completely integrated it to a scenario, to receive an alert based on a situation?

I had written to SAP in Dec 2022 & in Jun 2023 via OSS messages to understand how can that be done and at both times, I received message back saying all the components required to make this work is not yet released.

Now, even after 2048 upgrade (and 18 months after my last OSS message to SAP), still the Situation is no different. When I try to built a custom situation object via ADT, I still do not have authorization to do that (eventhough I have complete development access to the tenant)

The interfaces required to have an event based trigger is not yet released. Interfaces required for defining callback classes are also not released. Thus, custom classes cannot be defined for any of the actions or triggers.

The only way I have managed to create a custom situation object is via Key User Extensibility, referencing a custom CDS view.

SAP had published the tutorial and examples for creation of custom situation object via ADT, long time ago (https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-user-guide/creating-situation-objects?version=s4hana_cloud) and messages like this, this & this from SAP employees, seem to indicate that whatever is required to build the solution is all delivered by SAP.

So, what am I missing here? Has SAP delivered this functionality at all for S/4HANA on Cloud (or ABAP on Cloud) as per their training/documentation?

If yes, what is still needed in developer roles to avoid the error? If no, when is this functionality expected to be fully released?

Cc: @ana_goncalves @angelika_salmen 

Thanks

entry.title: How to maintain Priority in Purchase requisition and Purchase order for work item approvals.
entry.content:
How to maintain Priority in Purchase requisition and Purchase order so that it will reflect in Approval process

entry.title: Integration between S/4Hana Public Cloud and non-SAP dashboard application
entry.content:
Hi,

I am new to the Integration topic and I would like to get a possible solution to enable a third party dashboard application to access data from the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system.

I am aware that S/4HANA Cloud provides pre-delivered APIs which could be leveraged. Or custom CDS Views could be built from whitelisted CDS Views and exposed as OData service to be consumed. Is SAP CPI (Cloud Platform Integration) required for this?

entry.title: CDS view for production order configuration data
entry.content:
Hello,

We are working with variant configuration in public cloud. The requirement is to have a CDS view where we can display the configuration data on a production order (as shown below).

Can anyone suggest what data structure I can use in public cloud to create this custom CDS view? I have been searching the data sources in data browser app, but unfortunately I haven't found anything useful yet. Any input would be highly appreciated.

Thanks

Snigdhodeep

entry.title: User List Format in a Specificied Format/Custom Report
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

We are currently extracting the user list export from "Maintain Business Users" application using the Download button, which creates an excel comma separate value (.csv) sheet with data in rows delimited by a semi-colon (;)

 

We need the data in column format (Usernames, Last Name, First Name, Business Partner ID etc. as headers or column names).

Is there any possibility to modify the existing process or if there is any functionality to create a custom report in the above specified format ?

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Creating PR via API doesn't work with the workflow having "teams and responsibilties" configured.
entry.content: I am trying to create PR by uploading an API, but the worklfow fails with "no users found for task". I have "workflow administration" recipient step coming from "Manage teams and responsibilties" app. Is it possible to make it work or I need to remove the teams config. and keep users in recipients?

entry.title: Add field Service Entry Sheet Name to the Create Supplier Invoice app
entry.content:
Dear,

Please advise if it is possible to add field Service Entry Sheet Name to the Create Supplier Invoice app?

 

Ekaterina

entry.title: SAP_COM_0008 is Not Listed in the Scenario Field While Creating the New Communication Arrangement
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m currently enabling the Business Partner OData API in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and have run into an issue. While creating a Communication Arrangement, I do not see the scenario SAP_COM_0008 listed.

Here are the details:

  • Development Tenant: STARTER 080
  • Required Scope Item: 1RO (activated in STARTER 100 Customizing Tenant)

If anyone has encountered this issue or has any guidance on how to resolve it, I would greatly appreciate your help.

Thank you!

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Purchase Order Deferral Engine
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I’m trying to manage Accruals/Deferrals in a Starter Customizing environment in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using Purchase Order Accruals, but I’m facing issues with deferral determination. 

Here’s the scenario:

I created a service purchase order with a schedule line from August 2024 to October 2024 for a total value of 1,200 EUR (400 EUR per month). In the Process Control section, I only selected Invoice Receipt.

When I run the Accruals Job (Purchase Order Accruals - Post Periodic Accruals) on 31/08, the accrual posting of 400 EUR is generated correctly.

On 15/09, I post the invoice for the full value of the purchase order. At this point, I expect that when I run the job on 30/09, the accrual will be reversed and the deferral for the third month (October) will be generated. However, the deferral is not created.

What could be the issue? Are there any different settings that need to be configured?

I’ve already checked the Accrual/Deferral configuration, but I’m still unsure why the system isn’t generating the deferral after the invoice is posted. Could it be related to the Process Control setup, or is there a specific step I might have missed in the Accruals Job configuration?

Any insights or suggestions would be highly appreciated!

entry.title: Custom Analytical Query Input Filter
entry.content:
Hello SAP, 

We are trying to create a report. We have created a Custom CDS View and on top of it we have created a Custom Analytical Query.

Is it possible to include selection screen input field with two values to choose from 1. MISC and 2. NEC?

We want selection screen with two values to choose from could you please suggest.

Thanks and Regards. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to change in house production duration
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

We have a question about in house production duration. Why our in house production duration and processing time is set to 999 days? on material master data we already set the in house production to 0. And for this case , we have been trying to use non material stock for the routing so the field for in house production in app Change Material is unavailable. But why the in house production duration and processing time is set to 999 days?

Any suggestion what we have to check and change?

Thank You!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to separate parent production orders for each child production lot.
entry.content:
Hello. 
I have a question about production orders.

 

I want to separate the parent manufacturing order for each child manufacturing lot. From a traceability perspective, we know that we can check the lots of child components used in the lot cockpit, but in the semiconductor sector we want to separate manufacturing orders by component.

For example, is it possible to separate a manufacturing order for 100 A into an order for 60 units based on lot 001 and an order for 40 units based on lot 002?　

Parent product A, child product B.
To produce one unit of A, one unit of B is required.

100 units of A are required.
Split B → 60 units, 40 units.
(60 units = lot number 001, 40 units = lot number 002)

In such a case, is there a way to split the production order for A into two parts?
Or does it remain as one?
For example.
The production order for product A is 60 units (lot number 001).
The production order for product A is for 40 units (lot no. 002), etc.

I would appreciate it if someone could tell me how to do this and whether it is possible!
